acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The validator checks .schema_version == 2 before continuing with node and edge validation; the bad schema_version smoke log records the expected rejection.
The validator checks the deterministic epoch exported_at value; the bad exported_at smoke log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh requires registries to be an object.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The validator checks .registries object type; the non-object registries smoke log records the expected rejection.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/roadmap.sh requires the required top-level collections to be arrays.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The validator checks nodes, edges, runs, findings, node_notes, assignments, waves, and wave_memberships as arrays; the collection smoke log records one expected rejection per field.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports and roadmap export pass the stricter check.

acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The evidence directory contains qd-reports-check.log, just-check.log, git-diff-check.log, and the requested temporary-copy negative smoke logs.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
